title: Senior Teacher - Gradeup Ventures Solutions - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Gradeup Ventures Solutions - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Join the Gradeup Ventures Solutions family as a Senior Teacher in Visakhapatnam. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Gradeup Ventures Solutions:
Gradeup Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Gradeup Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
